name: Post-injection hypo risk
description: Morning injection at 07:30, breakfast was small. BG at 9.0 at 08:00, drops steadily as the rapid insulin component peaks, hitting 5.0 by 09:30 and stabilising around 4.5. Meal window is active until 09:30. Tests interaction between meal window suppression and a genuinely developing low — early nudges should be suppressed (food still absorbing), but BG keeps dropping because the meal was undersized.
